title: outline shader
description: a texture pack that adds a white outline to minecraft
body:
![](https://files.catbox.moe/7my3iw.gif)
### **-ˏˋ🌠▫ Inspirationˊˎ-**
> An outline shaders resource pack, inspired by spheya´s shaders for systemzee. it has the white and black outline. 

### **-ˏˋ📝▫ Requirementsˊˎ-**
> Graphics: fabulous  
> Install as a usual resource pack
